name: Cantina 6x10 Shed Plan - A Modern Sloped-Roof Storage Studio with Compact Efficiency
open_features: 6x10 Modern Shed with Sloped Roof - Clean, contemporary profile with excellent water runoff
DIY-Friendly Construction - Straightforward framing and beginner-friendly instructions
Single Entry Door - Secure access for tools, supplies, and seasonal storage
Modern Minimalist Aesthetic - Vertical siding, crisp trim, and a sleek mono-slope silhouette
Compact & Versatile - Ideal for tool storage, garden equipment, hobby supplies, or a micro studio
Roof Type: Mono-slope roof with extended overhangs
description_summary: Kick off your next backyard upgrade with the Cantina Sloped Roof Shed Plan - a 6x10 compact modern shed that blends clean lines, simple construction, and smart storage potential. With its streamlined mono-slope roof, vertical siding, and minimal footprint, the Cantina is the perfect solution for homeowners who need organized storage without sacrificing yard space. Whether you're building a garden tool shed, utility hub, paint/storage closet, or a tidy micro-workspace, the Cantina 6x10 deliver...
